tool_args.label: NYCT, MTA Bus, and SIR Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023

payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023
payload.description: Mid-Year FY2023 financial and ridership report for NYCT, MTA Bus Company, and Staten Island Railway covering October 2023 month and year-to-date results against the July Financial Plan 2023 Mid-Year Forecast

evidence_refs.source_quote: Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023
Jaibala Patel , Deputy Chief Financial Officer, MTA

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit
Bus Company
Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023
STATEN ISLAND RAILWAY
Jaibala Patel , Deputy Chief Financial Officer, MTA

tool_args.label: NYCT Year-to-Date Total Revenues October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenues of $4,274.2 million were $135.3 million (3.1%) lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT Year-to-Date Total Ridership October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total ridership was 1,254.4 million, which was lower than the Forecast by 10.5 million (0.8%).

tool_args.label: NYCT Year-to-Date Total Expenses October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses of $10,821.1 million including non-cash liabilities were $41.5 million (0.4%) lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT Headcount End of October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of October, total headcount was 46,563, which was 3,890 lower than the Forecast of 50,453.

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Operating Ratio YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Farebox Operating Ratio was 35.2%, which was lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT Cost per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Cost per Passenger was $6.38, which was higher than the Forecast by $0.12 per passenger mainly due to lower than projected ridership.

tool_args.label: NYCT Revenue per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Revenue per Passenger was $2.24, which was in line with the Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT Bus Farebox Revenue YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT Bus farebox revenue was $38.1 million (6.7%) lower than the Forecast due to a lower than projected ridership.

tool_args.label: NYCT Subway Farebox Revenue YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subway farebox revenue was $23.3 million (1.1%) higher than the Forecast due to a higher than projected ridership.

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Farebox Revenue October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT farebox revenue totaled $301.2 million, which was $3.3 million (1.1%) lower than the Forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total overtime was $208.9 million (39.2%) unfavorable.

SIR Year-to-Date Total Revenues October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenues of $13.488 million were $1.815 million (15.5%) higher than the Mid-Year Forecast

tool_args.label: SIR Year-to-Date Total Ridership October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total ridership was 1.844 million, 11.1% lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR Year-to-Date Total Expenses October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses of $76.320 million including non-cash liabilities were $6.308 million (7.6%) lower than the forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR Headcount End of October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of October total headcount was 354, which was 66 lower than the forecast of 420.

tool_args.label: SIR Farebox Operating Ratio YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Farebox Operating Ratio was 7.6%, which is higher than the forecast by 0.5 percentage points

tool_args.label: SIR Cost per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Cost per Passenger was $26.62, which is lower than the forecast by $2.84 per passenger

tool_args.label: SIR Revenue per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Revenue per Passenger was $2.02, which was lower than the forecast by $0.08 per passenger

tool_args.label: SIR Farebox Revenue YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: SIR farebox revenue totaled $2.993 million in October 2023, which was $0.485 million (14.0%) below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company YTD Total Revenues October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenues of $160.0 million were $4.6 million (2.8%) unfavorable to the Mid-Year Forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company YTD Total Ridership October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total ridership of 73.0 million was higher than the Forecast by 1.8 million (2.5%)

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company YTD Total Expenses October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses before non-cash liabilities of $707.7 million were favorable to the Forecast by $56.1 million (7.3%)

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Headcount End of October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of October, the total headcount was 3,643, which was 263 lower than the Forecast of 3,906.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company YTD Total Expenses incl. Non-Cash October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses of $752.2 million including the non-cash liabilities were $168.3 million (18.3%) lower than the Forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Farebox Operating Ratio YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Farebox Operating Ratio was 21.1%, which is higher than the Forecast by 3.6%

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Cost per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Cost per Passenger was $9.65, which is lower than the Forecast by $1.78

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Revenue per Passenger YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date October Revenue per passenger was $2.04, which is higher when compared to the Forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Farebox Revenue YTD October 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTABC farebox Year-to-Date revenue totaled $148.9 million, which was $5.0 million (3.5%) higher than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Results based on preliminary close of general ledger

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: NYCT Overtime driven by vacancy/absentee coverage

payload.claim_text: Overtime was $185.9 million (44.4%) unfavorable primarily due to vacancy / absentee coverage needs and additional maintenance requirements.
payload.subject: NYCT Overtime

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overtime was $185.9 million (44.4%) unfavorable primarily due to vacancy / absentee coverage needs and additional maintenance requirements.

tool_args.label: NYCT Bus ridership lower than projected YTD

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $12.3 million (0.4%) unfavorable mainly due to lower than projected Bus ridership offset by higher than projected Subway ridership and favorable average fare.
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Farebox Revenues were $12.3 million (0.4%) unfavorable mainly due to lower than projected Bus ridership offset by higher than projected Subway ridership and favorable average fare.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company farebox revenue favorable due to higher ridership and fare

payload.claim_text: Favorable farebox revenue were mainly due to higher average fare and higher ridership.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Farebox Revenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Favorable farebox revenue were mainly due to higher average fare and higher ridership.

tool_args.label: SIR revenue increase from capital reimbursements timing

payload.claim_text: This increase was primarily attributed to the favorable timing of $2.426 million of capital and other reimbursements despite a decrease in farebox and other revenue of $0.611 million.
payload.subject: SIR Total Revenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: This increase was primarily attributed to the favorable timing of $2.426 million of capital and other reimbursements
